name: ux-factory-visual-regression
description: CI visual-regression gate (epic #1, ticket #9, gate 3/3) — factory tooling, isolated.

scripts.update:docker: docker run --rm -v "$PWD/../..":/work -w /work/tooling/visual-regression mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.61.1-jammy sh -c 'npm ci && npx playwright test --update-snapshots'
